# Contributing to Blackwell Ops

Thanks for your interest in contributing!

## Ways to help
- Report bugs using the bug report template
- Suggest features
- Improve documentation
- Test on different Windows + GPU setups (especially Blackwell / Ada cards)
- Share benchmarks or setups

## Development
See the README for build instructions.

Most development happens in:
- `src/` (frontend React/TypeScript)
- `src-tauri/src/` (Rust backend)

## Pull Requests
- Use the PR template
- Keep changes focused
- Update docs/README when behavior changes

## Code of Conduct
Be respectful. This is a project built to make serious local inference better on Windows.

Questions? Start a Discussion or open an issue.
